div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
atmospheric_density_empirical(
alt_km, f107_obs, f107_adj, ap_daily)
Multi-layer NRLMSISE-00 table + solar scaling [DOC-02 fix]
T_inf = T_c + 3.24f107_adj + 1.3(obs-adj) + 28*Ap^0.4
Solar scaling: log10(rho) += (T_inf - 976K) / 550 [1 decade/550K]
log10-density interpolated at 10 altitude shells:
100-1500 km reference nodes (NRLMSISE-00, F10.7=150 Ap=15)
Clamp: rho > 1e-18 kg/m³
if alt > 1500km or < 0 return 0.0

for Sun & Moon across t_span:
_eval_cheb_3d_njit(t_norm, coeffs)
Clenshaw recurrence (N=20 nodes)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_atmospheric_density(alt_km, t_jd)
get_space_weather(t_jd)
atmospheric_density_empirical()
(Jacchia-71, see Section C)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_powered_derivative(t_sec, y, ...)
7-DOF: y = [x,y,z,vx,vy,vz,mass]
Thrust direction in VNB or RTN frame:
VNB: V=vel/|vel|, N=r×v/|r×v|, B=V×N
RTN: R=r/|r|, N=r×v/|r×v|, T=N×R [PHY-02 fix: T=N×R not V×N]
_build_vnb_matrix_njit(r,v) or _build_rtn_matrix_njit(r,v)
dm/dt = -F/(Isp*g0)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J2/J3/J4 Zonal Harmonics (WGS84)
fJ2 = 1.5·J2·μ·Re²/r⁵
fJ3 = 0.5·J3·μ·Re³/r⁷
fJ4 = 0.625·J4·μ·Re⁴/r⁹
Altitude-aware truncation (Numba path)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Atmospheric Drag
alt_km = |r| - Re
rho = rho_ref * exp(-(alt-alt_ref)/H)
v_rel = v - _earth r
a_drag = -0.5·ρ·1e3·(Cd·A/m)·|v_rel|·v_rel

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3rd Body Gravity
_eval_cheb_3d_njit(t_norm, sun_coeffs) sun_pos
_eval_cheb_3d_njit(t_norm, moon_coeffs) moon_pos
a_sun = GM_sun*(d_sun/|d|³ - r_sun/|r_sun|³)
a_moon similarly

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Solar Radiation Pressure (Cannonball)
d_ss = r - sun_pos
scale = (AU/|d_ss|)²
a_srp = ν·P0·scale·Cr·(A/m)/1000

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 11px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
srp_cylindrical_illumination_factor_njit(r, r_sun)
Night side + || < Re ν=0 else ν=1

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_srp_illumination_factor_njit(r, r_sun, Re, R_sun)
alpha=asin(Re/r), beta=asin(R_sun/d)
gamma=acos(-r·d_sun / (|r||d|))
Penumbra: circle-circle intersection area
ν = 1 - overlap/β² [0,1]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
scipy.integrate.solve_ivp(
method='DOP853' (RK8(7)),
coast: rtol=1e-8, atol=1e-8 [default],
powered: rtol=1e-12, atol=1e-12,
dense_output=False)
Adaptive step-size control — NUM-01 fix: tolerances
match propagate_cowell() kwargs

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 11px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 3: Exact Curvilinear TCA
ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=cpu_count())
submit evaluate_pair(A, B) for each pair

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
evaluate_pair(A, B):
1. coarse_dists = distance_3d(traj_A, traj_B)
2. t_idx = argmin(coarse_dists)
3. if coarse_min > coarse_threshold return None

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Build CubicSpline(times_jd, traj, bc='natural')
spline_A, spline_B
vel_spline_A, vel_spline_B (from vel_map if available)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dense 1-second scan:
bracket_width = 1 or 2 (edge detection)
t_dense = linspace(t_lo, t_hi, seconds_in_bracket)
rA_dense = spline_A(t_dense)
rB_dense = spline_B(t_dense)
tca_dense_idx = argmin(distance_3d(rA, rB))

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 11px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
tca_jd = t_dense[tca_dense_idx]
pos_A, pos_B at TCA
vel_A = vel_spline(tca) OR spline'(tca)/86400

estimate_covariance(days_since_epoch)
Heuristic diagonal RTN covariance
rotate_covariance_rtn_to_eci(cov_rtn, pos, vel)
RTN ECI rotation matrix Q
cov_eci = Q @ cov_rtn @ Q.T
src = 'SYNTHETIC'

span.p:
_dynamic_radius_km(obj, rel_vel_hat, pos, vel)
Priority:
1. TLE dimensions_m + attitude (TUMBLING/NADIR/INERTIAL)
projected_area_m2(dims, quat, v_hat) sqrt(A/)/1000
2. OMM rcs_m2 sqrt(RCS/)/1000
3. DebrisObject.radius_m / 1000
4. Fallback: 5m sphere

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_classify_risk(P_c):
P_c > 1e-4 CRITICAL
P_c > 1e-5 HIGH
P_c > 1e-6 MEDIUM
else LOW, None UNKNOWN

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Determine covariance_source:
CDM / COMSPOC_SYNTHETIC / SYNTHETIC / UNAVAILABLE
MIXED(A+B) if sources differ

ConjunctionEvent(

tca_jd, miss_distance_km,
relative_velocity_km_s,
collision_probability = P_c,
risk_level, position_a_km, position_b_km,
covariance_source)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
as_completed(futures) aggregator
events.append(result)
if STRICT_MODE and exception raise AstraError
else log.warning + skipped++

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
events.sort(key=lambda x: x.miss_distance_km)
log.info('N events detected')
return list[ConjunctionEvent]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compute_collision_probability(
miss_vector, rel_vel, cov_A, cov_B, ra, rb)
Foster (2002) short-encounter integral:
Combined covariance Σ = cov_A + cov_B
Project to encounter B-plane ( rel_vel)
HBR = ra + rb (hard-body radius)
Integrate bivariate normal over HBR disk
P_c [0, 1]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compute_collision_probability_mc(
miss_vec, rel_vel, cov_A, cov_B, ra, rb,
n_samples=100000)
MC sampling from N(miss_vec, Σ)
count hits within (ra+rb)
P_c_mc = hits / n_samples

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
propagate_covariance_stm(cov0, Phi)
Φ(t,t0) = state-transition matrix (66)
cov(t) = Φ @ cov0 @ Φ.T
Propagate uncertainty forward in time

span.p:
teme_to_ecef(pos_teme, t_jd)
get_eop_sb(t_jd) (xp, yp, dut1)
GAST = greenwich_apparent_sidereal_time()
R3(-GAST) @ (I + polar_correction) @ pos_teme

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ecef_to_geodetic(x, y, z)
Bowring iterative algorithm
(lat_rad, lon_rad, alt_km)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute topocentric vector:
obs_ecef = geodetic_to_ecef(lat, lon, alt)
delta = sat_ecef - obs_ecef
Rotate to SEZ (South-East-Zenith)
elevation = asin(SEZ_z / |delta|)
azimuth = atan2(SEZ_e, -SEZ_s)

span.p:
teme_to_ecef(pos_teme, t_jd)
Primary: get_eop_sb() for live EOP
Fallback: get_ut1_utc_correction() via Skyfield IERS
GAST = GMST + equation_of_equinoxes
W = polar_wobble_matrix(xp, yp)
pos_ecef = R3(-GAST) @ W @ pos_teme

span.p:

span.p:
get_logger(name).error/warning()
structlog structured fields:
timestamp, module, function, norad_id, message
stderr / log file

div.style: color: rgb(216, 243, 220) !important; font-size: 10px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_sw_cache: dict[date_str (f107_obs, f107_adj, ap)]
TTL: 24h (CelesTrak), 6h (Spacebook recent)
_SW_LOCK (RLock), _SW_DOWNLOAD_LOCK (Lock)
Background refresh thread (daemon=True)

span.p:
_guid_map: dict[norad_id(int) UUID str]
TTL: 12h, background refresh on stale
_GUID_LOCK (RLock), _GUID_DOWNLOAD_LOCK (Lock)

div.style: color: rgb(216, 243, 220) !important; font-size: 10px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
_skyfield_loader, _skyfield_ts, _skyfield_eph
Singleton initialised once per process
_SKYFIELD_INIT_LOCK (RLock)
de421.bsp: ~17 MB local cache

div.style: color: rgb(216, 243, 220) !important; font-size: 10px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_SESSION_CACHE: dict[username requests.Session]
Cookie-based session reuse
_SESSION_LOCK (threading.Lock)
spacetrack_logout() clears cache

span.p:
All results are
typed Python objects:
list[SatelliteTLE/OMM]
list[OrbitalState]
list[ConjunctionEvent]
list[DebrisObject]
list[PassEvent]
list[NumericalState]
NumericalState / ConjunctionDataMessage
All serialisable via dataclasses.asdict()
